---
title: "Awards"
output:
  html_document:
    fig_width: 1
    toc_float: false    
---


* 2019:
  - Best LACSC 2019 Paper Award in the 4th Latin American Conference for Statistical Computing with the paper entitled **A general dynamic factor approach to forecast conditional covariance matrices in high-dimensional data** (LACSC2019)
  - Scholarship 4th Latin American Conference for Statistical Computing (LACSC2019) 
  - International Symposium on Forecasting Travel Award (declined)
</br>  
* 2018:
  - IASC-ERS Young Researchers Award with the paper entitled  **Robust principal volatility components** (COMPSTAT2018). 
</br>   
* 2016:
  - Second place prize y-BIS Best Paper Award with the paper entitled **Measuring the Effect of the Uncertainty in the Estimation of the Conditional Covariance Matrix in Portfolio Selection and Portfolio Risk Measures** (ISBIS2016)
  - ISBIS 2016 Travel Award

----
